Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class AppointmentSchedulingPolicy

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.AppointmentSchedulingPolicy
public class AppointmentSchedulingPolicy extends SObject

Java class for AppointmentSchedulingPolicy complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="AppointmentSchedulingPolicy">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="AppointmentStartTimeInterval" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DeveloperName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ExtCalEventHandler" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ApexClass" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ExtCalEventHandlerId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsOrgDefault" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsSvcTerrOpHoursWithShiftsUsed" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsSvcTerritoryMemberShiftUsed" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Language" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MasterLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShouldConsiderCalendarEvents" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShouldEnforceExcludedResource" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShouldEnforceRequiredResource" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShouldMatchSkill" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShouldMatchSkillLevel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShouldRespectVisitingHours" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShouldUsePrimaryMembers" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShouldUseSecondaryMembers" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
